title: Prosaptia pectinata
taxonomy: Prosaptia pectinata is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. This classification places Prosaptia pectinata within the group of vascular plants. The order of Prosaptia pectinata is Polypodiales, which is a large group of ferns. As a member of the Polypodiaceae family, Prosaptia pectinata is closely related to other ferns within this family.
uses: Prosaptia pectinata, a species of fern native to New Caledonia, has been found to possess potential medicinal properties.
